title: [codereview-3] T-Deck WiFi: credential and IPv6 prefix config via LCI missing
description: WiFi backhaul requires SSID/PSK provisioning. The LCI (Local Client Interface) and CoAP config resources must support WiFi station config and upstream prefix observation. RPL root must inject the WiFi-acquired prefix into DODAG. NAT64 not yet wired for IPv4 reachability. Expand config_apply.c and rpl_root.c for these.
